How to handle missing condition attributes:

Select an item to preview attributes (optional)
Unique identifier for this modifier. Leave empty to auto-generate based on item ID.

How to modify the attribute:
• ADD: Add new modifier
• REMOVE: Remove existing modifier
• SET: Replace existing modifier
• ADD_TO: Add to existing value
• SUBTRACT_FROM: Subtract from existing
• REPLACE_WITH: Replace attribute and/or value

How the value is applied:
• ADD_VALUE: Flat addition
• ADD_MULTIPLIED_BASE: Percentage of base value
• ADD_MULTIPLIED_TOTAL: Percentage of total value
When using REPLACE_WITH mode, the new attribute ID. Leave empty to keep same attribute.
The new value when Use Replace Value is enabled.
Which equipment slot contains the item to modify.
If enabled, replaces the attribute value with the specified value.
morequesttypes.config.item_with_drop_rat: Left Click: Select Item & Set Drop Rate
Right Click: Edit Drop Rate Only
morequesttypes.config.nbt_path.check_exi: Only apply if the path already exists in the item's NBT.
morequesttypes.config.nbt_path.compariso: First comparison value (or minimum for ranges).
How to compare numeric values for VALUE_COMPARE condition.
morequesttypes.config.nbt_path.condition: Values to check against. Supports placeholders.
NBT path to check for the condition. Supports 'root.' prefix.

Condition that must be met:
• NONE: Always apply
• PATH_EXISTS/NOT_EXISTS: Check path presence
• ENTRY_EXISTS/NOT_EXISTS: Check specific entries
• VALUE_EQUALS/NOT_EQUALS: Exact match
• VALUE_COMPARE: Use comparison mode
How many condition entries must match. -1 = all entries must match.
morequesttypes.config.nbt_path.how_to.ad: To ADD to this compound, use this format in NBT Entries
To ADD to this list, use this format in NBT Entries

morequesttypes.config.nbt_path.how_to.se: To SET/REPLACE this entire compound, use this format in NBT Entries
To SET/REPLACE this entire list, use entries in NBT Entries
To SET this value, use this in NBT Entries (enable 'Is Value')
morequesttypes.config.nbt_path.how_to.su: To SUBTRACT from this value, use this in NBT Entries (enable 'Is Value', use REMOVE operation)
morequesttypes.config.nbt_path.info: Configure NBT path modifications for equipment rewards

morequesttypes.reward.easynpc_dialogue.c: Only use entities with this exact custom name.

morequesttypes.reward.easynpc_dialogue.n: Entity type to use as dialogue partner (e.g., easy_npc:humanoid). Use @e for any entity.
morequesttypes.reward.easynpc_dialogue.s: How to select the entity: NEAREST, FURTHEST, or RANDOM.
morequesttypes.reward.equipment_attribut: The value to modify the attribute by. Can be negative.
The entity attribute to modify (e.g., minecraft:generic.attack_damage).

Which slot the attribute bonus applies to. This can be different from the target item slot.

Example: Modify chest item (target_slot = CHEST) but make the bonus only work when equipped in legs slot (attribute_slot = LEGS).
Only apply if the target attribute already exists on the item.
If enabled and condition attribute doesn't exist, uses the middle value between first and second for comparison. If disabled, missing attribute defaults to 0.

Maximum value for range comparisons. Ignored for non-range comparisons.
Unique identifier for this modifier. Leave empty to use the item's ID as default.

ADD: Add new modifier. REMOVE: Remove existing modifier. SET: Replace existing modifier. ADD_TO: Add to existing value. SUBTRACT_FROM: Subtract from existing value. REPLACE_WITH: Replace attribute ID and/or value.
ADD_VALUE: Flat addition. ADD_MULTIPLIED_BASE: % of base value. ADD_MULTIPLIED_TOTAL: % of total value.
When using REPLACE_WITH mode, the new attribute ID. Leave empty to keep the same attribute.
When Use Replace Value is enabled, the new value to set.
Which equipment slot to modify (MAIN_HAND, OFF_HAND, HEAD, CHEST, LEGS, FEET).

If enabled, replaces the attribute value with the specified value below.
morequesttypes.reward.levelz.kind.toolti: EXPERIENCE: Give raw XP. LEVEL: Give skill levels. SKILL_POINT: Give skill points.
morequesttypes.reward.levelz.operation_t: ADD: Add to current. SET: Set to exact value. REDUCE: Subtract from current.
morequesttypes.reward.levelz.skill.toolt: The skill to modify (requires LevelZ mod). Use 'Player Level' for overall player level.
morequesttypes.reward.levelz.title: %s %s (%s) to %s
morequesttypes.reward.locked.tooltip: If true, this reward cannot be toggled off once claimed.
morequesttypes.reward.loot_table.drop_if: If true, drops items on the ground when the player's inventory is full.
morequesttypes.reward.loot_table.respect: If true, applies the player's luck attribute to loot generation.
morequesttypes.reward.loot_table.rolls.t: Number of times to roll the loot table.
morequesttypes.reward.loot_table.table.t: The loot table ID to use (e.g., minecraft:chests/simple_dungeon).
morequesttypes.reward.nbt_path.check_exi: Only apply the operation if this path already exists in the item's NBT.
morequesttypes.reward.nbt_path.condition:
Values to check against when using ENTRY_EXISTS, ENTRY_NOT_EXISTS, VALUE_EQUALS, or VALUE_NOT_EQUALS conditions.

Examples:
• minecraft:zombie_spawn_egg (check if item ID matches)
• {attribute:"minecraft:generic.armor"} (check if armor bonus exists)
• '"Custom Name"' (check if custom name matches)

Supports placeholders: {claimer_name}, {claimer_uuid}, {claimer_uuid_array}

NBT path to check for the condition. Supports 'root.' prefix for item-level fields.

Examples:
• root.id - Check item type
• minecraft:custom_name - Check custom name
• more_quest_types:equipment_bonuses.bonuses - Check attribute list

Condition that must be met for the operation to apply:

NONE: Always apply
PATH_EXISTS: Path must exist
PATH_NOT_EXISTS: Path must not exist
ENTRY_EXISTS: Check if specific entry exists in list/compound
ENTRY_NOT_EXISTS: Check if specific entry doesn't exist
VALUE_EQUALS: Value must match exactly
VALUE_NOT_EQUALS: Value must not match
VALUE_COMPARE: Use comparison mode (>, <, ==, etc.)
How many condition entries must match. -1 = all entries must match. Set to 1 to require at least one match, 2 for at least two, etc.
Controls operation behavior:

TRUE (Value Mode):
• ADD: Adds to numeric value (e.g., health += 5)
• REMOVE: Subtracts from numeric value (e.g., durability -= 10)
• SET: Replaces with new value (e.g., count = 64)
• Works on: Single values like count, id, custom_name

FALSE (List/Compound Mode):
• ADD: Appends to list or merges into compound
• REMOVE: Removes matching entries from list
• SET: Replaces entire list/compound
• Works on: Lists like bonuses, spell_ids, enchantments
morequesttypes.reward.nbt_path.nbt_entri:
List of SNBT entries to add/remove/set. Each entry is automatically quoted as a string.

Value Examples:
• minecraft:diamond_sword (for root.id)
• 64 (for root.count)
• '"Custom Name"' (for custom_name - note the quotes)

List/Compound Examples:
• {amount:5.0d,attribute:"minecraft:generic.armor",modifier_id:"custom_armor",operation:"ADD_VALUE",slot:"chest"}
• {id:"minecraft:protection",lvl:4s}

Placeholders (team rewards only):
• {claimer_name} - Player's name
• {claimer_uuid} - Player's UUID
• {claimer_uuid_array} - UUID as int array
morequesttypes.reward.nbt_path.operation: ADD: Adds entries to a list or compound. REMOVE: Removes entries from a list. SET: Replaces the entire value.
morequesttypes.reward.nbt_path.path.tool:
The path to the NBT tag. Use dots (.) to navigate nested tags. Prefix with 'root.' to access item-level fields.

Examples:
• minecraft:custom_name - Component custom name
• more_quest_types:equipment_bonuses.bonuses - Attribute bonuses list
• root.id - Item type (e.g., minecraft:diamond_sword)
• root.count - Item stack size
• spell_engine:spell_container.spell_ids - Spell list
morequesttypes.reward.nbt_path.target_it: Only modify items matching this type. Leave empty to modify any item in the target slot.
morequesttypes.reward.nbt_path.target_sl: Which equipment slot to modify: MAINHAND, OFFHAND, HEAD, CHEST, LEGS, or FEET.
morequesttypes.reward.nbt_path.title: %s to %s

morequesttypes.reward.play_sound.pitch.t: Pitch of the sound (0.1 to 3.0). 1.0 is normal pitch.
Volume of the sound (0.0 to 10.0). 1.0 is normal volume.

morequesttypes.reward.potion.effect.tool: The potion effect to apply (e.g., minecraft:regeneration).
morequesttypes.reward.reset_object.targe: Quest or task IDs to reset. Use # for tags (e.g., #sometag) or hex IDs for specific quests/tasks.

The skill to modify (requires Reskillable mod).

EXPERIENCE: Give raw XP. POINTS: Give skill points.
morequesttypes.reward.skills_level.opera: ADD: Add to current. SET: Set to exact value. REDUCE: Subtract from current.
morequesttypes.reward.skills_level.point: Source ID for skill points (e.g., more_quest_types:reward).
morequesttypes.reward.skills_level.title: %s %s (%s) to %s
morequesttypes.reward.spell.spell.toolti: The spell ID to install (requires Spell Engine mod).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.aggro.toolt: Who the entity should attack: NONE, CLOSEST, FARTHEST, or CLAIMER (quest completer).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.boots.toolt: Boots item to equip on the entity.

Chestplate item to equip on the entity.

morequesttypes.reward.summon.custom_name: Sets a custom display name for the spawned entity. Leave empty for default name.
Custom NBT data in SNBT format to apply to the entity.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.despawn_dis: Distance in blocks. Entity despawns if player moves farther away.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.despawn_if_: If true, entity despawns when the player dies.
If true, entity despawns when the player logs off.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.dungeon_dif: The Dungeon Difficulty level to set on the summoned mob.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.duration_ti: How long the entity exists before despawning. -1 = permanent (respects other despawn conditions).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.entity.tool: The entity type to summon (e.g., minecraft:zombie).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.follow.tool: If true, entity follows the player.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.helmet.tool: Helmet item to equip on the entity.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.helmet_drop: Chance (0.0 to 1.0) that the helmet will drop when the entity dies.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.leggings.to: Leggings item to equip on the entity.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.leggings_dr: Chance (0.0 to 1.0) that the leggings will drop when the entity dies.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.mainhand.to: Item to equip in the entity's main hand.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.mainhand_dr: Chance (0.0 to 1.0) that the main hand item will drop when the entity dies.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.mob_level.t: The Dynamic Difficulty level to set on the summoned mob.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.offhand.too: Item to equip in the entity's off hand.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.offhand_dro: Chance (0.0 to 1.0) that the off hand item will drop when the entity dies.
If true, entity won't despawn naturally (still respects other despawn conditions).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.random_spaw: Random offset radius in blocks. 0 = exact position.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.reward_kill: Who receives the rewards when the entity dies: OWNER (quest completer only) or ANYONE (whoever kills it).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.reward_tabl: Reward tables to trigger when the entity dies. Each table can have a drop rate and trigger mode (ALL/RANDOM).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.scoreboard_: Comma-separated list of scoreboard tags to add to the entity.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.set_dungeon: If enabled, sets the Dungeon Difficulty level of the summoned mob (requires Dungeon Difficulty mod).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.set_mob_lev: If enabled, sets the Dynamic Difficulty level of the summoned mob (requires Dynamic Difficulty mod).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.set_owner.t: If true, tames the entity to the player (only works for tameable entities).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.smart_spawn: If true, finds a valid spawn position (solid ground, no suffocation).
morequesttypes.reward.summon.spawn_limit: Maximum number of entities from this reward that can exist per player. -1 = unlimited.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.spawn_x.too: X coordinate offset (relative) or absolute position.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.spawn_y.too: Y coordinate offset (relative) or absolute position.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.spawn_z.too: Z coordinate offset (relative) or absolute position.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.texture_abo: Custom texture to render above the entity. Use image resource location.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.texture_off: X offset for the custom texture position.
Y offset for the custom texture position.
Z offset for the custom texture position.
morequesttypes.reward.summon.use_absolut: If true, uses absolute world coordinates. If false, uses relative to player position.

Number of times to catch the specified item(s).

morequesttypes.task.levelz.mode.tooltip: TOTAL_LEVEL: Check total skill level. LEVEL: Check player or skill level.
morequesttypes.task.levelz.skill.tooltip: The skill to check (requires LevelZ mod). Use 'Player Level' for overall player level.
morequesttypes.task.match_components.too:
How strictly to match item components:

NONE: Only check item type (minecraft:diamond_sword)
FUZZY: Match common components (enchantments, damage, etc.)
STRICT: Match all components exactly
morequesttypes.task.min_tags.tooltip: Minimum number of scoreboard tags that must match. 0 means all tags are required.
morequesttypes.task.mob_level_comparison: How to compare the mob's Dynamic Difficulty level (requires Dynamic Difficulty mod).
morequesttypes.task.mob_level_first.tool: The level to compare against, or minimum level for range comparisons.
morequesttypes.task.mob_level_second.too: Maximum level for range comparisons. Ignored for non-range comparisons.
morequesttypes.task.nbt.tooltip: SNBT compound tag to match against entity NBT. Only entities with matching NBT will count.
morequesttypes.task.nbt_filters.tooltip:
List of NBT patterns that the item must match. All filters must pass for the item to be valid.

Each entry is a partial NBT match - the item must contain at least the specified NBT structure.

Examples:
• {components:{"minecraft:unbreakable":{}}} - Item must have unbreakable component
• {components:{"minecraft:custom_name":'"Epic Sword"'}} - Must have specific custom name
• {components:{"minecraft:enchantments":{levels:{"minecraft:sharpness":5}}}} - Must have Sharpness 5

Empty compound tags {} check if the key exists (any value accepted).
Non-empty values must match exactly.

Placeholders:
• {player_uuid} - Player's UUID as string
• {player_name} - Player's username
• {player_uuid_array} - UUID as int array [I;...]
morequesttypes.task.origins.layer.toolti: The origin layer to check (requires Origins mod).
morequesttypes.task.origins.origin.toolt: The specific origin the player must have.
morequesttypes.task.origins.title: Be %s origin: %s
morequesttypes.task.place_block.block.to: The block type that must be placed. Leave empty for any block.
morequesttypes.task.place_block.block_ta: Match blocks in this tag instead of a specific block type.
morequesttypes.task.place_block.title: Place %s × %s
morequesttypes.task.potion_effect.amplif: Required effect amplifier (0 = level 1, 1 = level 2, etc.). Use -1 for any amplifier.
morequesttypes.task.potion_effect.effect: The potion effect that must be active (e.g., minecraft:regeneration).
morequesttypes.task.reskillable.mode.too: TOTAL_LEVEL: Check total skill level. SKILL_LEVEL: Check specific skill level.
morequesttypes.task.reskillable.skill.to: The skill to check (requires Reskillable mod).
morequesttypes.task.second_number.toolti: Maximum value for range comparisons. Ignored for non-range comparisons.
morequesttypes.task.skills_level.categor: The skill category ID (requires Pufferfish's Skills mod).
morequesttypes.task.skills_level.mode.to: TOTAL_LEVEL: Check total level across all categories. CATEGORY_LEVEL: Check specific category level.
morequesttypes.task.structure.tooltip: Structure ID or tag (prefix with #) where the action must occur. Leave empty for any structure.
morequesttypes.task.tags_csv.tooltip: List of scoreboard tags the entity must have.
morequesttypes.task.timer.duration.toolt: How long the timer must run for the task to complete.
morequesttypes.task.timer.title: Timer
morequesttypes.task.trading.check_buy_it: If true, checks the item you're selling. If false, checks the item you're receiving.
morequesttypes.task.trading.profession.t: Required villager profession. Leave empty for any profession.
morequesttypes.task.trading.title: Trade %s× with %s
Item to check in the trade. Leave empty for any item.
morequesttypes.task.trading.traded_item_: Match items in this tag instead of a specific item.
morequesttypes.task.use_block.block.tool: The block that must be right-clicked/used.
Match blocks in this tag instead of a specific block. Prefix with # for tags (e.g., #minecraft:logs).
morequesttypes.task.use_block.title: Use %s × %s
morequesttypes.task.use_block.value.tool: Number of times to use/interact with the specified block(s).
morequesttypes.task.use_item.any_item.to: If enabled, any item will count (item and tag filters are ignored). Use NBT filters to specify requirements.
morequesttypes.task.use_item.hand.toolti: Which hand must be used: ANY, MAIN_HAND, or OFF_HAND.
morequesttypes.task.use_item.item.toolti: The item that must be used. Leave empty for any item.
morequesttypes.task.use_item.item_tag.to: Match items in this tag instead of a specific item.
morequesttypes.task.use_item.title: Use %2$s × %1$s
